text: I love how your whole face lights up when you smile.
I love how on our first hangout you gave me the most butterflies I’ve ever had.
I love how you turn random, insignificant moments into ones that I cherish.
I love how the corners of your lips turn up sometimes when you look at me.
I love how I thought “wow, I’m really in this” the first time you said I love you.
I love how forgiving you are with me.
I love how safe I feel in your arms.
I love how you let me kiss you goodbye on your forehead.
I love how you bring out the best in me — I’ve become a better person since we started our relationship.
I love how when I’m with you, I don’t overthink.
I love how effortlessly our conversations flow.
I love how you make sacrifices to see me and to make me feel good.
I (usually) love how cute it is that you’re obsessed with your lashes.
I love how you don’t mind when I respond instantly.
I love how you gave me a chance.
I love how my heart flutters whenever I see a notification from you, and how I feel compelled to open it immediately.
I love how your little mannerisms, like saying “heh” and your minor fondness for DTI, have rubbed off on me.
I love that we call all the time.
I love how your lash glue somehow ends up on everything you touch.
I love how you’re usually willing to bike to Lexington Center with me.
I love how much you love garlic naan.
I love how you express your love for me — especially via DoorDash.
I love how comfortable I am with you — there isn’t anyone else in the world I act more like myself around.
I love how your voice reflects your mood.
I love the niche qualities you notice in me, like a lilt in my voice or my eyebrow cowlick.
I love how you say my name.
I love the slight smile you have when you get out of the car to come to my house.
I love how you show me shows you love like Big Mouth and Stranger Things.
I love how much you trust me.
I love how you say I made you more comfortable about your body image.
I love how you sometimes walk like you’re in an audition for Queer Eye without even noticing.
I love your style.
I love the handmade cards and gifts you make me — please don’t stop, they’re my favorite gifts ever.
I love how tears welled in your eyes when I said “I love you” that one time in my basement.
I love how much you love the flowers I made for you.
I love how impressed you are by the things I build.
I love how you thought I was a senior for the first two weeks we were talking on Snap.
I love how far we’ve come in our relationship.
I love how normal things feel special to me because it’s you who does them.
I love how we pound it every time one of us burps.
I love how you love having deep conversations.
I love how talking to you can reshape my view of the world in seconds.
I love your family.
I love how you sleep on my lap when we drive to the Berkshires.
I love how we have fun together, whether we have high energy or no energy at all.
I love how passionate you are about DTI.
I love how I could listen to your voice all day.
I love how you always make my smile bigger.
I love how much passion you have for the things you love.
I love how I remember the layout of your room perfectly — I will be coming back, mark my words.
I love how you act with me in public, like the world is our playground.
I love how you listen to me.
I love how both of our moods lift when we see each other.
I love how communicative you are.
I love how your hugs warm my entire body.
I love how when we hug, it feels like two puzzle pieces fitting perfectly together.
I love how you are a whole person (niche reference).
I love how you lean your head on my shoulder on the couch or in the car.
I love how happy you are to be in a relationship with me.
I love how even in difficult moments, you still tell me “I love you” each night.
I love how when I’m with you, all I want is to be with you forever.
I love thinking about our future together.
I love how we make each other better people.
I love how you feel radically different from anyone else I know in the best, most unique way.
I love the names you call me when you tell me goodnight.
I love waking up next to you or on call with you.
I love how you're my favorite person to do absolutely nothing with.
I love how distracting you are.
I love the names you call me when you tell me goodnight.
